All functions

bind_letter_to_score()
Helper to Extract A Letter Grade From Scores

Apply Special Transformations to the n3_land Dataset

Apply Special Transformations to the n3_marine Dataset

Build the Northern Three Region Dataset

Build the Named Islands Within the Northern Three Region

Build the Sub Basins Within the Northern Three Region

Build the Landbased Water Types Within the Northern Three Region
build_waterbodies()
Build the Marine Based Water Types Within the Northern Three Region
build_waterbody_boundaries()
Build the Marine Zone Boundaries Within the Northern Three Region

A Helper That Presents Conditional Formatting Options
define_colour_scheme()
Helper to Select Various Colour Schemes

Return the Model's Min and Max Dates

Return Colour Palettes Associated With Specific Variables

Provide a Range of Models to Choose From

Check if object is Stars or list of Stars, Convert if List
ereefs_map()
Mapping eReefs Data
ereefs_reproject()
Convert the eReefs object from curvilinear to a regular grid
ereefs_windrose()
Create a Windrose Plot from eReefs Data
extract_air_temp()
Extract, Crop, and Combine Air Temperature Data
extract_dhw()
Extract Degree Heating Week Data from NOAA's API
extract_ereefs()
Extracting eReefs Data

Extract Habitat Data from Datasets on File
extract_land_use()
Extract Land Use Data from a collection of Datasets on File
extract_logger()
Extract AIMS MMP Logger Data
extract_rainfall()
Extract Rainfall Data from BOM AWO API
extract_sst()
Extract Sea Surface Temperature Data from NOAA's API
extract_watercourses()
Extract Watercourses

Return the YAML params during an interative session
maps_inset_layer()
Create a Tmap Inset (corner) Map
maps_water_layer()

name_cleaning()
A Name Cleaning Function for N3 Tables
nc_aggregation_helper()
A function to help with various forms of netCDF aggregation
nc_high_res_crop()
Crop A Raster and Increase its Resolution at the Same Time
qld
Queensland State Border
row_splitter()
Split a Table into N rows
save_n3_table()

Function that converts scores to grades
sf_change_over_time()

value_to_score()
Function that converts values to score
weight_score()
Function that weights scores based on predetermined weighting values
